cart.title: The Plunder Haul
cart.addBillingAddressPrompt: Please add a billing port address to continue yer plunder purchase.
cart.howToPay: How do ye want to settle yer plunder?
cart.addCardPrompt: To add a Letter of Credit, please click on the Add New Letter of Credit button.
cart.allUpToDate: Arr, yer ship's ledger be all squared away!
cart.noUnpaidInvoices: No unsettled Bills of Plunder found.
cart.balanceInvoiceInfo: Coin Chest & Bill of Plunder Info
cart.thankYouForOrder: The Captain thanks ye for yer orders.
cart.paymentActivationPrompt: Please settle yer doubloons for vessel activation. When payment be received, yer vessel will immediately set sail.
cart.bankPaymentNote: After payment be made, open a grievance with the transaction ID, date, and amount paid. We will manually credit the doubloons.

creditCard.name: Pirate Name
creditCard.verifyIntroStep1: Verification be needed before yer Letter of Credit is available for use. InterServer will charge yer Letter of Credit with two amounts under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBillingStatement: These charges will show up on yer billing statement within a couple of minutes, usually under pending transactions. If ye do not see these charges, please contact yer Letter of Credit issuer for more details.
creditCard.verifyVoidNotice: These authorization charges are only for verification purposes and will be voided within 3-5 days, depending on yer bank.
creditCard.acceptTempCharges: I accept two temporary charges under $1.00 each.
creditCard.verifyBankLogin: Log in to yer Letter of Credit's online banking or call yer bank to verify the two amounts charged. They often show under Pending Charges. These authorization charges will disappear in about 3-5 days depending on yer bank.
creditCard.enterAmountsPrompt: Please enter the two amounts charged to yer Letter of Credit. The values must be in USD.
creditCard.currencyNote: Please note that the charges on yer Letter of Credit statement may be in a different currency from the one required on the last confirmation page described above. If yer Letter of Credit statement does not display the original transaction amounts in the required currency, ye will have to contact yer Letter of Credit company. They should be able to tell ye the amounts of the two charges in the original currency.
creditCard.deleteConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to remove yer Letter of Credit {card}?
creditCard.verifiedTooltip: This letter has been authenticated and set sail for use in our system.
creditCard.notVerifiedTooltip: Validate the Letter of Credit first, ye scallywag
creditCard.enableCardTooltip: Click here to set this Letter of Credit sailing.
creditCard.removeCreditCard: Strike this Letter of Credit from the Manifest

paymentSuccess.title: Plunder Successfully Received
paymentSuccess.successful: Doubloons Received! Hoist the Jolly Roger!
paymentSuccess.thankYou: The Captain thanks ye for yer doubloons. Yer transaction has been completed successfully.

paymentTypes.title: Payment Types
paymentTypes.ccNote: All Letters of Credit must be verified before they can be used. To verify them, click the "Verify" button.
paymentTypes.deleteInvoiceConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to throw yer Bill of Plunder {id} overboard?

prepays.title: Pre-Loaded Coin Chest
prepays.autoUseInvoices: Automatically use on Bills of Plunder:
prepays.noHistoryFound: No history found in the ship's log!
prepays.showingPage: Showing page {page} of {totalPages} and {records} records out of {totalRecords}
prepays.autoUseNewInvoices: Automatically use on new Bills of Plunder
prepays.deletePrepayConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to throw yer Coin Chest #{id} and its entire history overboard?
